title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 14
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear a visitor asking for directions inside a building.
questions.audio_script: Receptionist: Are you here for the parents' meeting? || Visitor: Yes, but I don't know where to go. The email said it was in the school hall. || Receptionist: It was, but we had to move it because the projector stopped working. || Visitor: Is it in the dining room now? || Receptionist: No, that room is being cleaned. [1]The parents' meeting is in the music room now[/1]. || Visitor: Thanks. Do I need to sign in first? || Receptionist: Yes, just write your name here, then follow the corridor to the end. || Receptionist: That should make things easier.

dialogue.speaker: receptionist
dialogue.text: Are you here for the parents' meeting?

dialogue.speaker: visitor
dialogue.text: Yes, but I don't know where to go. The email said it was in the school hall.

dialogue.speaker: receptionist
dialogue.text: It was, but we had to move it because the projector stopped working.

dialogue.speaker: visitor
dialogue.text: Is it in the dining room now?

dialogue.speaker: receptionist
dialogue.text: No, that room is being cleaned. The parents' meeting is in the music room now.

dialogue.speaker: visitor
dialogue.text: Thanks. Do I need to sign in first?

dialogue.speaker: receptionist
dialogue.text: Yes, just write your name here, then follow the corridor to the end.

dialogue.speaker: receptionist
dialogue.text: That should make things easier.

questions.question: Where is the parents' meeting taking place?

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, large school hall, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The receptionist says the parents' meeting is in the music room.

questions.context: You hear two people preparing for an event.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are you ready for the school fair on Sunday? || Woman: Nearly. I was going to bring cakes, but the cooking club is making those. || Man: We might need balloons too. || Woman: Emma is bringing that, so don't worry. The organiser asked me this morning, and [1]I have to bring the box of second-hand books[/1]. || Man: Good. Is there space in your bag? || Woman: Yes, if I take out my big coat. The forecast says it will be warm. || Woman: That should make things easier. || Woman: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a coach talking to a player.
questions.audio_script: Coach: Are you joining the practice this evening? || Player: Yes, but I'm not sure what to bring. Last week we used tennis rackets. || Coach: That was only because the hall was busy. Today we are outside again. || Player: Should I bring cones then? || Coach: No, the club has enough of those. [1]You need your swimming goggles today[/1]. || Player: OK. I'll pack them with my water bottle. || Coach: Good. And arrive ten minutes early so we can start on time. || Coach: That should make things easier. || Coach: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear two colleagues talking at work.
questions.audio_script: Man: Why did the meeting start late this morning? || Woman: I thought it was because the coffee machine broke, but that wasn't the main problem. || Man: Was the lift broken again? || Woman: No, it was working after someone restarted it. The real reason was that [1]the visitor badges were not ready at reception[/1]. || Man: That explains it. Did anyone miss the first part? || Woman: A few people did, so the manager is sending notes to everyone this afternoon. || Woman: That should make things easier. || Woman: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: No, it was working after someone restarted it. The real reason was that the visitor badges were not ready at reception.

dialogue.text: That should make things easier.

dialogue.speaker: woman

questions.context: You hear a parent asking for help at home.
questions.audio_script: Dad: Could you help me before dinner? The house is a mess because your cousins are coming. || Daughter: Sure. Do you want me to take out the rubbish? || Dad: I already did that this morning. || Daughter: Then I can feed the cat. || Dad: Your dad is doing that outside. [1]Can you sweep the kitchen floor[/1], please. || Daughter: OK. I'll start now, but I need five minutes to finish this message first. || Dad: That's fine. Just do it before they arrive. || Dad: That should make things easier. || Dad: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a teacher talking to a student.
questions.audio_script: Teacher: How is your science project going? || Student: Quite well. I found the information online and wrote the introduction last night. || Teacher: Have you added photos of the experiment? || Student: Not yet, but Sam is doing that part. I thought I had to make a poster too. || Teacher: No, not for this project. [1]You still need to draw a simple diagram of the machine[/1]. || Student: Great. I can do that after school. || Teacher: Remember to check the spelling before you send it to me tomorrow morning. || Teacher: That should make things easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a birthday present.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you bought Jack's birthday present yet? || Woman: Not yet. I was going to get a football, but he already got one for his team. || Man: What about a board game? Jack likes those. || Woman: True, but I bought something similar last year. I saw a nice blue sports bottle in town, and [1]I'm going to buy the blue sports bottle[/1]. || Man: That sounds perfect. Do you want me to come with you? || Woman: Yes, please. I always choose better presents with help. || Woman: That should make things easier. || Woman: I did not want to decide at the last minute.
